'''zhazhapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kaak|kaak]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kaak|kaak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhazhapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzhæpæth|zhæzhæpæth]] || [[word:zhæzhæpæj|zhæzhæpæj]] || [[word:zhæzhæpæsh|zhæzhæpæsh]] || [[word:zhæzhæpæ|zhæzhæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhazhapath|zhazhazhapath]] || [[word:zhazhazhapaj|zhazhazhapaj]] || [[word:zhazhazhapash|zhazhazhapash]] || [[word:zhazhazhapa|zhazhazhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazhapath|zhazhapath]] || [[word:zhazhapaj|zhazhapaj]] || [[word:zhazhapash|zhazhapash]] || [[word:zhazhapa|zhazhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhafpafth|zhazhafpafth]] || [[word:zhazhafpafj|zhazhafpafj]] || [[word:zhazhafpafsh|zhazhafpafsh]] || [[word:zhazhafpaf|zhazhafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazhapatha|zhazhapatha]] || [[word:zhazhapaja|zhazhapaja]] || [[word:zhazhapasha|zhazhapasha]] || [[word:zhazhapaka|zhazhapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazhapath|zhazhapath]] || [[word:zhazhapaj|zhazhapaj]] || [[word:zhazhapash|zhazhapash]] || [[word:zhazhapa|zhazhapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazhapathal|zhazhapathal]] || [[word:zhazhapajal|zhazhapajal]] || [[word:zhazhapashal|zhazhapashal]] || [[word:zhazhapakal|zhazhapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazhapaathatha|zhazhapaathatha]] || [[word:zhazhapaajaja|zhazhapaajaja]] || [[word:zhazhapaashasha|zhazhapaashasha]] || [[word:zhazhapaaka|zhazhapaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazhapathan|zhazhapathan]] || [[word:zhazhapajan|zhazhapajan]] || [[word:zhazhapashan|zhazhapashan]] || [[word:zhazhapakan|zhazhapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazhapathaoro|zhazhapathaoro]] || [[word:zhazhapajaoro|zhazhapajaoro]] || [[word:zhazhapashaoro|zhazhapashaoro]] || [[word:zhazhapakaoro|zhazhapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
